mano_cua.result_summary: 多个Bug：(1)工具栏缺少file_tools附件按钮 (2)POST /attachments返回404导致上传失败 (3)图片取消选中行为不一致-点击编辑器外部无法取消选中，仅点击图片右侧同行区域可以 (4)上传失败后进度条未显示错误状态
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Testing revealed: missing file_tools toolbar group (no UI for image upload), POST /attachments 404 error on upload, inconsistent deselect behavior (clicking outside editor doesn't deselect image, only clicking to the right of image works), and progress bar doesn't show error state after upload failure.
